is it a bad idea to buy pure cores with silver?
yes
you can get standard characters on limited banners but you can't get most limited characters from the standard banner (it's a very small chance even for the ones that you can)
on top of that there are a lot of free sources of pure cores (daily/weekly) but luminous cores are exclusive to events and silver exchange
i think you can make a case for the standard wheels banner but it's still not recommended

Also you can save yourself a lot of pain on goliath if you focus on bursting his phase 1 as fast as possible

Especially since he only really uses his power move in phase 1

Wait is Faint basically immortality? She can keep generating death resistance?
multi hit will destroy you
So she'd work in a counter team
And she can't keep generating death res
All death res gains are halved when you triggered it not just your current death res
honestly if her min gen was 20 it wouldnt be so bad
i also thought this too at first but after playing caro for a while it feels like death resistance past 400% is mostly redundant...
the next breakpoint for guaranteed death resistance is at 800 and then after that is 1600
Also adding that again her own gains are halved once you trigger it
So if she added 100% then after you trigger death res it becomes 50 then 25 then 12.5
The halving applies to all death res increases
having a lot of death resistance is nice but i feel like it would be more productive to use a different character who adds more survivability or more damage to prevent yourself from dying
